mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM df_datasource WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM df_task WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM df_open_api WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM df_task_execution WHERE delete_flag = 0 AND created_time >= CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM df_task_execution WHERE delete_flag = 0 AND created_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM df_task_execution WHERE delete_flag = 0 AND status = 'SUCCESS' AND created_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)

SELECT e.id, e.task_id AS taskId, e.task_code AS taskCode, t.task_name AS taskName, e.environment, e.execution_id AS executionId, e.status, e.trigger_type AS triggerType, e.start_time AS startTime, e.end_time AS endTime, e.created_time AS createdTime FROM df_task_execution e LEFT JOIN df_task t ON t.id = e.task_id AND t.deleted = 0 WHERE e.delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY e.created_time DESC, e.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
